circuit.title: Standard 17-station circuit
circuit.description: Official-style circuit: 17 active stations across actor, written desk, and practical study slots (rest and pilot slots do not score).

medical_emergencies.description: Oral viva stems plus verbal BLS practice — no manikin, aligned with official ME examiner format.

copy.station_definition: A timed OSCE scenario with a simulated patient or desk task, followed by structured feedback.
copy.circuit_definition: A continuous mock exam session that sequences multiple stations under circuit timing, similar to the official OSCE sitting.
copy.me_definition: Medical emergency oral viva and verbal BLS — procedural timing and examiner stems, not hands-on CPR training.
